data_loading.name: mzML File Loading
data_loading.description: The program successfully loads and validates the QC_0.mzML file, confirming it exists and is in valid mzML format.

data_processing.name: Feature Detection Algorithm
data_processing.description: The program executes a feature detection algorithm such as peak picking or chromatogram analysis (e.g., using XCMS, OpenMS or equivalent tools).

modeling_or_analysis_or_visualization.name: Feature Table Generation
modeling_or_analysis_or_visualization.description: The program generates a feature table containing detected features with m/z values, retention times, and intensity values.

modeling_or_analysis_or_visualization.name: Quality Metrics Calculation
modeling_or_analysis_or_visualization.description: The program calculates quality metrics for the detected features, including measurements such as peak width, symmetry, or signal-to-noise ratios.

output_saving.name: Results Export
output_saving.description: The program saves the feature table in a standard format such as CSV or mzTab to the specified output location.
